name: 05-09-home-light-nav-real-text-layer
title: Home light nav real text layer
description: Add a real DOM/SVG navigation text layer over the 1:1 image-backed light homepage nav so nav labels are no longer only bitmap pixels.
scope: homepage light navigation text DOM/SVG layer extraction
creator: lijin
notes: Navigation visible labels now render through a data-home-light-nav-text-layer=real-dom-text SVG overlay while the approved 1:1 nav image remains as backing for icon/background fidelity. Static route tests, typecheck, and build passed. Playwright intentionally skipped because user confirmed manual visual inspection is available.

meta.bitmap_remaining_scope: nav background, logo/icon art, search pill chrome, theme icon, decorative/button shapes
real_text_labels: 搜索附近坐标、角色、记忆线索
meta.visual_qa: manual inspection available; Playwright self-check skipped by user preference
